tracks.label: Sunny Market v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless game menu loop for Harvest Friends, a cozy food-animal auto-battler. Warm sunny farmers market mood, playful marimba and pizzicato strings, soft brushed percussion, light acoustic bass, tiny kitchen percussion, inviting but not childish, clear loopable ending, no vocals.

tracks.label: Prep Counter v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless preparation-screen loop for a cozy food-animal strategy game. Gentle countertop rhythm, soft xylophone, muted upright piano, plucked strings, relaxed planning energy, curious and tidy, light kitchen taps as percussion, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Picnic Skirmish v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless battle loop for a cute-but-tactical picnic auto-battler. Bright tempo, hand percussion, pizzicato strings, toy piano accents, nimble bass, energetic without becoming frantic, whimsical combat momentum, no vocals, strong loopable groove.

tracks.label: Little Victory v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental short seamless victory loop for a cozy food-animal game. Warm small-win celebration, ukulele, glockenspiel, soft claps, gentle brass flourish, sunny and satisfying, restrained enough for a results screen, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Soft Defeat v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless defeat loop for a cozy game, tender and encouraging rather than tragic. Soft felt piano, muted strings, distant music box, slow gentle rhythm, bittersweet but safe, leaves room to restart, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Ruined Market v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless horror menu loop for a post-human automated food market. Low industrial drones, distant failing machinery, cold synth pulses, sparse metallic percussion, unsettling but usable for a menu, faint distorted market ambience, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Cold Prep Table v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless planning loop for a cold post-human prep table in a strategy horror game. Refrigeration hum, restrained sub bass, surgical metallic ticks, distant warning tones, tense concentration, not too busy, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Midnight Skirmish v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless combat loop for a future-war food-machine horror auto-battler. Driving industrial percussion, pulsing dark synth bass, glitch hits, emergency-light rhythm, tense tactical momentum, aggressive but readable, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: False Victory v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental short seamless false-victory loop for a horror strategy game. Hollow triumph, detuned brass pad, cold choir-like synth without voices, slow machine pulse, achievement with dread underneath, no vocals, loopable ending.

tracks.label: Last Defeat v2
tracks.prompt: Instrumental seamless defeat loop for a post-human machine-horror game. Deep mournful synth, distant metal stress, slow heartbeat-like pulse, cold ambience, final but not melodramatic, leaves space for UI, no vocals, loopable ending.
